hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(node|npm|npx|expo)\b'; then echo "$input" | jq --arg prefix 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use --silent && ' '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", updatedInput: (.tool_input + {command: ($prefix + .tool_input.command)})}}'; fi
